task_completion.description: Create or open a 2024 tax return for Thomas Redcrow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software (e.g., StudioTax 2024) interface showing 'Thomas Redcrow' entered as the primary taxpayer in the personal information or identification section.

task_completion.description: Include dependent son Leo in the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Dependents' section or equivalent form in the tax software showing 'Leo' added as a dependent son.
A screenshot showing 'Form T90' (Income Exempt under the Indian Act) open and actively filled out within the tax software.

task_completion.description: Ensure on-reserve income is treated as exempt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Income entry screens showing amounts entered into tax-exempt specific fields (e.g., T4 Box 71) or the Form T90 calculating the exempt on-reserve income.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'thomas_redcrow.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box, file explorer window, or software title bar confirming the file is named 'thomas_redcrow.24t' and located in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual tax software GUI to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the tax software's graphical interface (e.g., StudioTax), rather than editing a raw file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the software and generate the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'echo' or python scripts being used to instantly create the 'thomas_redcrow.24t' file.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or imported the data from the provided documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening the source documents from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\redcrow\' and inputting that information into the tax software forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRA Form T90 relates to Indian Act tax exemptions, and Section 87 provides the basis for tax-exempt status. Ensure the agent specifically uses Form T90 to claim the exemption.
